testcase.name: SC-01-T13 · P09 ReviewDone › TI3 · subscribe is idempotent (double-tap does not error)
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › sc-01/t13-review-done.spec.ts:286:3 › SC-01-T13 · P09 ReviewDone › TI3 · subscribe is idempotent (double-tap does not error)
Error: expect(locator).toBeEnabled() failed
Locator: locator('[data-testid="p09-next-due-card-add-calendar-btn"]') Expected: enabled Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeEnabled" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('[data-testid="p09-next-due-card-add-calendar-btn"]')
298 | await page.goto('/review/done?nodeId=100&sid=200'); 299 | const addBtn = page.locator(`[data-testid="${TID.addCalendarBtn}"]`); > 300 | await expect(addBtn).toBeEnabled(); | ^ 301 | 302 | // First tap 303 | await addBtn.click(); at /Users/allen/workspace/longfeng/.claude/worktrees/sc01-t13-review-done/frontend/apps/h5/tests/e2e/sc-01/t13-review-done.spec.ts:300:26
